Rabindra Bharati University Entrance.official_note: Official RBU notices page; fetched OK. Carries admission and merit-list publication notices (e.g. '1st merit list 4-year UG Programme (B.F.A.) under NCCF', dated 23 June 2026). Actual merit lists are name-based PDFs linked from here; rbu.ac.in/home/admission returns 404.

Rajasthan Bachelor of Business Administr.official_note: Replaced the wrong Shiksha link. Rajasthan BBA admission to govt colleges is merit-based (Class-12 marks, no separate entrance) and handled by Dept of College Education; this is the official central merit/waiting-status portal (dceapp.rajasthan.gov.in). Per-college BBA merit list PDFs are also published under hte.rajasthan.gov.in. Not fetched (interactive ASP.NET form). No college/branch rank table available.

Rajasthan Engineering Admission Process.official_note: Official REAP (Centre for Electronic Governance, Govt of Rajasthan) seat-allotment/cutoff page; confirmed via search as the live REAP 2025 counselling portal. WebFetch returned HTTP 403 (bot-block), so not directly verified. already_has_data=true.

Rajasthan University of Health Sciences.official_note: Official RUHS site is ruhsraj.org.in (the old ruhsraj.org/admission/ has an invalid TLS certificate). RUHS conducts NEET-based counselling and publishes cutoffs/closing ranks here. Both domains returned 403/cert errors to WebFetch (bot-block), so not directly verified. already_has_data=true (careers360 cutoff source).

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Tech.official_note: Official RGIPT B.Tech 2025-26 Round-1 first-seat-allotment cutoff PDF; fetch returned a valid PDF (105 KB). Parent admission page: https://www.rgipt.ac.in/BTech-Admission-2025-26/ . PDF is a scanned/non-text-extractable layout so individual rows could not be parsed, but it is the authoritative cutoff document. already_has_data=true.

Rashtriya Raksha University (Police).official_note: Official admission page of Rashtriya Raksha University (national police/security university, Gandhinagar); confirmed via search. Program-wise merit lists are published as separate pages (e.g. https://rru.ac.in/b-tech-cse-first-merit-list/). WebFetch returned 403/429 (bot-block/rate-limit), so not directly verified and rows could not be read.

Sikkim Bachelor of Business Administrati.official_note: Replaced the wrong Sikkim Manipal University Shiksha link. Homepage cus.ac.in is Sikkim University / Central University of Sikkim; UG admission (incl. BBA) is CUET-based, with merit lists/info on this official admissions page (application portal: cusadmission.samarth.edu.in). Not fetched directly; no rank/merit table located.
